global.description: The ad features a bold title and clear call to action, promoting a game with gameplay previews.
global.main_message: Join the game for free rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.description: The text 'IronQuest' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top of the ad.

elements.description: A visual representation of a game interface featuring four game elements arranged in a grid.

elements.description: A subtle geometric pattern in the background that adds depth without distracting from the main content.
